pages.text: Fatima is always busy! She loves to run and play.

blocks.text: She loves to run and play.

pages.text: Her favourite part of the day is when Grandpa arrives. “How should we spend our day, Fatima?” asks Grandpa.

blocks.text: Her favourite part of the day is when Grandpa arrives.
“How should we spend our day, Fatima?” asks Grandpa.

pages.text: “I know!” says Fatima. “Let’s go to the park.” “I can see the whole world from up here,” Fatima shouts.

blocks.text: “I know!” says Fatima. “Let’s go to the park.”
“I can see the whole world from up here,” Fatima shouts.

pages.text: “I have an idea!” “Let’s play superheroes and pick up the litter,” says Fatima.

blocks.text: “Let’s play superheroes and pick up the litter,” says Fatima.

pages.text: “Great stuff! Now you can see all the flowers.” “What’s next?” asks Grandpa.

blocks.text: “Great stuff! Now you can see all the flowers.”

pages.text: “Weeeeee eee !” “What a crazy cool kid you are!” says Grandpa. “What’s next?”

blocks.text: “Weeeeee eee !” “What a crazy cool kid you are!” says Grandpa. “What’s next?”

pages.text: “How about something cold and delicious?” says Fatima.

blocks.text: “How about something cold and delicious?” says Fatima.

pages.text: “What’s next, kiddo?” asks Grandpa. Fatima yawns. “Let’s go home.”
“Hello, Fatima,” says Mum. “What did you and Grandpa do today?” “Not much!” they both say.

blocks.text: “What did you and Grandpa do today?”

pages.text: “What should we do tomorrow?” asks Fatima.

blocks.text: “What should we do tomorrow?” asks Fatima.

pages.text: Fatima hurries to bed. She is excited for her next adventure with her best friend, Grandpa.
